tasks.serve:deno: deno task prepare:deno && deno run --allow-read --allow-net dist/main.ts
tasks.deploy:deno:create: deno task prepare:deno && deno deploy create dist --app thecallagent-site --runtime-mode dynamic --entrypoint main.ts --region global
tasks.deploy:deno: deno task prepare:deno && deno deploy dist --app thecallagent-site --prod
